sub_pixel_system.notes: SimLife is a life simulation game with creature AI; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Creature Physics
special_mechanics.description: Simulated creature movement controlled by genetic parameters; players cannot directly control player character as this is an ecosystem simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Physics Manipulation
special_mechanics.description: Players can change the physics of the universe in the computer, affecting all simulated creatures and environments

tier_notes: Tier 3: SimLife is a life simulation/god game focused on ecosystem management and genetic engineering rather than direct player character control. No documented movement physics parameters, gravity values, or jump mechanics exist because the game does not feature a playable character with platforming mechanics. Movement is emergent from genetic parameters applied to simulated creatures.
